name: 06-17-pkcs-m3-baseline-corpus-ingestion
title: PKCS M3 baseline corpus ingestion

notes: Completed on 2026-06-18. Local data/private and data/raw were cleared, database schema was reset, 100 candidate public sources were downloaded/replaced as needed, 100 normalized packages were prepared with accepted degradation for missing images and fallback Markdown snapshots, and 100 sources were ingested into PKCS through the CLI-equivalent ingestion path. Sample search/read/context-pack validation passed.
